productDisplayName: Timberland Men Casual Brown Casual Shoes
description: Trendy and comfortable, the timberland Earthkeeper City Endure Mock Toe Oxford shoe comes in a classic design and is packed with features that makes it much more than just a footwear -  a perfect buy for those men who never compromise on comfort and style.UpperLeather upper for absolute durability, comfort and styleVelvet lining along the collarNubuck innerling for the tongue and fabric inner lining in the rest of the shoe for ultimate breathable comfortIntertwined lacing system for a snug, customised FitEmbossed branding on the lateral ankle for styleMidsoleCushioned anti-fatigue footbed with a leather lining on the backfoot with perforations, and Smart Comfort Biorhythmic Chassis channels to offer comfort where it's most neededOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with an impact guidance system and modified waffle pattern lugs for absolute grip and tractionRaised heel for ergonomic comfort and styleOutsole extending onto the upper as a toe guard and heel guard for enhanced foot protectionShoe careUse a branded leather conditioner and brushDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
